name: Slow-Cooker Sage Dressing
recipeIngredient: 7 cups Dry bread cubes or unseasoned croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the walls of the slow cooker with non stick spray.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients in a bowl and pour into the slow cooker.
3. Cover and cook on high setting for one hour, stirring well.
4. Cook on low for 2-3 hours.
5. This recipe yields approximately 116 calories per serving.
